name: forward_geocode
description: Convert an address or place name into geographic coordinates. Returns results ranked by relevance with confidence scores (0-10), detailed address components, bounding boxes, and optional annotations including timezone, currency, and sun rise/set times.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The address or place name to geocode. Minimum 2 characters.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100). Default is 10.

parameters.name: countrycode
parameters.description: Comma-separated ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes to restrict results.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: IETF language tag for the response language.

parameters.name: no_annotations
parameters.description: Set to 1 to exclude annotations (timezone, currency, etc.) from results.

parameters.name: no_dedupe
parameters.description: Set to 1 to disable deduplication of results.

parameters.name: address_only
parameters.description: Set to 1 to exclude POI names from formatted output.
